Basawan​

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
The monkey slain, his blood to be used as medicine for the ailing prince he has bitten, from a Tuti-nama (Tales of a Parrot): Fifth Night
by Basawan​
Mughal India, court of Akbar (reigned 1556–1605) · c. 1560 · gum tempera, ink, and gold on paper
←Basawan After Jacobo Bassano→
